label: Coworking Guest Booking Refund
customer_problem: A member says their guest booking vanished before tonight's workshop and asks for an instant day-pass refund.
customer_facts: The member had a guest booking for a workshop tonight.
The booking disappeared before the event.
The member asks for an instant refund.
risk_flags: Do not say the refund is approved immediately.
Do not say the guest pass is restored automatically.
Keep the attendance check visible before refund language.
success_criteria: Explain the 15-minute guest hold and attendance check.
Name front desk or support as the access reissue path.
operator_notes: Good for showing how user feedback can correct stale timing details.
The loop should avoid overpromising on refunds.
